summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The preflight artifact reports no security-sensitive hydrated refs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Already-closed PRs are skipped; open PRs are kept non-mutating unless a specific maintainer/product decision is needed.

actions.reason: Independent open PR; no closure, merge, or fix action is allowed or justified in plan mode.
